ecarx.carext.security.biometrics.face

Interface IFaceManager


  • public interface IFaceManager
    This class provides the API for managing face recognition functionality.
    Since:
    6

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static interface  IFaceManager.AuthenticationCallback
      Callback structure provided to authenticate(CancellationSignal, AuthenticationCallback, Handler, String).
      static interface  IFaceManager.EnrollmentCallback
      Callback structure provided to {@link #enroll(byte[], CancellationSignal, EnrollmentCallback).
      static interface  IFaceManager.RemovalCallback
      Callback structure provided to removeAll(java.lang.String, ecarx.carext.security.biometrics.face.IFaceManager.RemovalCallback).
      static interface  IFaceManager.SearchCallback
      Search result callback.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      default void authenticate(android.os.CancellationSignal cancel, IFaceManager.AuthenticationCallback callback, android.os.Handler handler, java.lang.String userId)
      Request authentication, This call operates the face recognition hardware and starts capturing images.
      default void enroll(byte[] hardwareAuthToken, android.os.CancellationSignal cancel, IFaceManager.EnrollmentCallback callback)
      Request face authentication enrollment.
      default void enroll(java.lang.String userId, byte[] hardwareAuthToken, android.os.CancellationSignal cancel, IFaceManager.EnrollmentCallback callback)
      Request face authentication enrollment.
      default boolean hasEnrolledTemplates(java.lang.String userId)
      Determine if there is a face enrolled(sync).
      default void hasEnrolledTemplates(java.lang.String userId, IFaceManager.SearchCallback callback)
      Determine if there is a face enrolled(async).
      default boolean isHardwareDetected()
      Determine if face authentication sensor hardware is present and functional.
      default void removeAll(java.lang.String userId, IFaceManager.RemovalCallback callback)
      Remove given face template from face hardware and/or protected storage.

    • Method Detail

      • authenticate

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_BIOMETRIC")
default void authenticate(@Nullable
                                                                                                 android.os.CancellationSignal cancel,
                                                                                                 @NonNull
                                                                                                 IFaceManager.AuthenticationCallback callback,
                                                                                                 @Nullable
                                                                                                 android.os.Handler handler,
                                                                                                 @Nullable
                                                                                                 java.lang.String userId)
        Request authentication, This call operates the face recognition hardware and starts capturing images. It terminates when IFaceManager.AuthenticationCallback.onAuthenticationError(int, CharSequence) is called, at which point the object is no longer valid. The operation can be canceled by using the provided cancel object.
        Parameters:
        cancel - an object that can be used to cancel authentication
        callback - an object to receive authentication events
        handler - an optional handler to handle callback events
        userId - userId to authenticate for(not UserHandle.getUserId)
        Since:
        6

      • enroll

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_BIOMETRIC")
default void enroll(@Nullable
                                                                                           byte[] hardwareAuthToken,
                                                                                           @Nullable
                                                                                           android.os.CancellationSignal cancel,
                                                                                           @NonNull
                                                                                           IFaceManager.EnrollmentCallback callback)
        Request face authentication enrollment. This call operates the face authentication hardware and starts capturing images. Progress will be indicated by callbacks to the IFaceManager.EnrollmentCallback object. It terminates when IFaceManager.EnrollmentCallback.onEnrollmentError(int, CharSequence) or {@link EnrollmentCallback#onEnrollmentProgress(int) is called with remaining == 0, at which point the object is no longer valid. The operation can be canceled by using the provided cancel object.
        Parameters:
        token - a unique token provided by a recent creation or verification of device credentials (e.g. pin, pattern or password).
        cancel - an object that can be used to cancel enrollment
        callback - an object to receive enrollment events
        Since:
        6

      • enroll

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_BIOMETRIC")
default void enroll(@Nullable
                                                                                           java.lang.String userId,
                                                                                           @Nullable
                                                                                           byte[] hardwareAuthToken,
                                                                                           @Nullable
                                                                                           android.os.CancellationSignal cancel,
                                                                                           @NonNull
                                                                                           IFaceManager.EnrollmentCallback callback)
        Request face authentication enrollment. This call operates the face authentication hardware and starts capturing images. Progress will be indicated by callbacks to the IFaceManager.EnrollmentCallback object. It terminates when IFaceManager.EnrollmentCallback.onEnrollmentError(int, CharSequence) or {@link EnrollmentCallback#onEnrollmentProgress(int) is called with remaining == 0, at which point the object is no longer valid. The operation can be canceled by using the provided cancel object.
        Parameters:
        userId - Cloud account ID, non Android account UserID
        token - a unique token provided by a recent creation or verification of device credentials (e.g. pin, pattern or password).
        cancel - an object that can be used to cancel enrollment
        callback - an object to receive enrollment events
        Since:
        12

      • removeAll

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_BIOMETRIC")
default void removeAll(@Nullable
                                                                                              java.lang.String userId,
                                                                                              @NonNull
                                                                                              IFaceManager.RemovalCallback callback)
        Remove given face template from face hardware and/or protected storage. It is only visible to the car owner. If the car owner deletes a user's local data, including user space and face data, they are required to delete
        Parameters:
        userId - userId to authenticate for(not UserHandle.getUserId)
        callback - an optional callback to verify that face templates have been successfully removed. May be null if no callback is required.
        Since:
        6

      • hasEnrolledTemplates

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_BIOMETRIC")
default boolean hasEnrolledTemplates(@NonNull
                                                                                                            java.lang.String userId)
        Determine if there is a face enrolled(sync).
        Parameters:
        userId - userId to authenticate for(not UserHandle.getUserId)
        Returns:
        true if a face is enrolled, false otherwise
        Since:
        6

      • hasEnrolledTemplates

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_BIOMETRIC")
default void hasEnrolledTemplates(@NonNull
                                                                                                         java.lang.String userId,
                                                                                                         @NonNull
                                                                                                         IFaceManager.SearchCallback callback)
        Determine if there is a face enrolled(async).
        Parameters:
        userId - userId to authenticate for(not UserHandle.getUserId)
        callback - Search result callback
        Since:
        12

      • isHardwareDetected

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_BIOMETRIC")
default boolean isHardwareDetected()
        Determine if face authentication sensor hardware is present and functional.
        Returns:
        true if hardware is present and functional, false otherwise.
        Since:
        6
